notes: Router contract case with an unsuitable skill menu: a clear log-reduction need (red CI with stack trace in ci.log) but candidate_skills contains only repo-map-builder, dependency-graph-analyzer, and test-generator — none appropriate for log reduction work. The gold artifact attempts to route to a skill not in the candidate_skills list (ci-log-reducer), which violates the closed-menu constraint. The validator rejects this with the chosen-skill-in-candidates check failing. Tests whether the validator correctly enforces on-menu routing even when the agent attempts to invent an appropriate but off-menu skill. Synthetic fixture; no customer data. Generated case.
